overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain forest trail. The character pauses to let a horse rider pass before continuing up a narrow, rocky ascent under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with pine trees and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide dirt trail through the forested mountain valley

entered.detail: large grey-white rocky mountain slope rising in the background
tall evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
tall evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the grass and trees
cluster of red wildflowers growing beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide dirt trail through a mountain forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path while a massive rocky mountain face rises in the background. Red wildflowers dot the grassy clearing on the right side of the trail.

events.description: character stops walking and turns to the right to observe the surroundings
rider on horseback gallops past from left to right behind the character

agents.ego_description: pauses on the trail and turns to watch a horse rider passing by

notable_agents.action: rider on a brown and white horse galloping past along the trail from left to right

segments.scene_description: The character stops and turns to the right as a rider on a brown and white horse with a red saddle gallops past from the left side. The horse and rider cross behind the character and exit to the right, kicking up dust on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ascent with steep cliffs

events.description: trail becomes narrower and rockier as it ascends the mountain slope, trees give way to cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on the increasingly rocky and narrow mountain trail

entered.detail: steep grey rock face with loose stones and sparse vegetation
large scattered boulders and rocky outcrops on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character continues ascending the mountain trail, which has become significantly narrower and rockier. The pine forest on the right gives way to a steep rocky cliff face, while large boulders appear scattered on the left hillside. The path winds upward through the rugged alpine terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transforms from a wide forest path into a rugged, narrow alpine ascent. It begins with the character walking through a mountain forest lined with tall pine trees and red wildflowers, with a massive rocky mountain face looming in the background. As the character pauses and turns to the right, a rider on a brown and white horse with a red saddle gallops past, kicking up dust on the dirt trail. The scene then shifts as the character continues upward, and the wide path narrows into a rocky climb where the pine forest gives way to a steep cliff face. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail through rugged terrain scattered with large boulders as it ascends further into the mountains.
